parameter.name: Random Seed
parameter.comment:
Controls the random numbers that
will be used to stagger the delays and amplitudes if random is turned up on them. Changing this forces the random values to be recalculated.

parameter.name: Input Gain
parameter.comment: Controls the gain of the input signal

parameter.name: Feedback
parameter.comment: Controls the amount of output signal fed back into the input

parameter.name: Number of Taps
parameter.comment: Controls the number of taps in the delay

parameter.name: First Delay
parameter.comment: The time of the first delay

parameter.name: Delay Range
parameter.comment: The time difference between the first and last delay

parameter.name: Delay Change
parameter.comment: The scaling factor between one delay and the next

parameter.name: Delay Random
parameter.comment: The random factor applied to the delay

parameter.name: Amplitude Change
parameter.comment: The scaling factor between one amplitude and the next

parameter.name: Amplitude Random
parameter.comment: The random factor applied to the amplitude

parameter.name: Dry/Wet Mix
parameter.comment: The level of delayed sound mixed into the output
